specific_question: How many automated notifications did the CRM system of Elexion Automotive send to sales representatives from February to November during 2024?
answer: Between February and November 2024, Elexion Automotive CRM system sent 19,255 automated email notifications to sales representatives about lead activities.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
